category_sources: Official homepage describes nload as monitoring network traffic and bandwidth usage in real time.
source_facts.description says it is a realtime console network usage monitor.
display_name_sources: Official homepage characteristics list name as nload.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents installation and usage; no separate dedicated docs site found.
Official homepage is the primary project page and help/download surface.
repo_sources: Official homepage states the source code is managed on GitHub and links to rolandriegel/nload.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repository was researched.
tags_sources: Official homepage describes real-time in/out traffic graphs and bandwidth usage.
source_facts.description identifies realtime console network usage monitoring.
